overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game set in an ancient Ptolemaic city at night. The player character runs and walks through torch-lit stone streets, passing Egyptian sphinx statues, Greek temples with columns, and waterfront plazas under a full moon.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple courtyard with sphinx statue and fire braziers

events.description: character transitions from walking to running toward the temple
NPC with wide-brimmed hat passes directly in front of the camera

agents.ego_description: running through the torch-lit courtyard toward the main temple structure, passing the sphinx statue

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with hat walks past the camera, temporarily blocking the view

entered.detail: large stone temple with columns and palm trees silhouetted against the moon
reclining stone sphinx statue with a fire brazier burning in front of it
tall palm trees framing the temple structure

segments.scene_description: The character runs through an open temple courtyard at night, approaching a large stone temple with palm trees. A fire brazier burns in front of a sphinx statue on the right. An NPC passes close to the camera around the 9-second mark, temporarily obscuring the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand temple staircase with carved reliefs and fire braziers

events.description: character approaches and begins ascending the wide temple stairs
character reaches the top of the stairs and turns to look back

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide marble staircase of the temple, passing between fire braziers and columns

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with carved relief panels on the sides
tall stone columns supporting the temple portico
carved stone panels depicting figures and hieroglyphs on the temple base

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grand staircase of the temple, moving between burning fire braziers. The camera tilts up to reveal tall columns and carved stone reliefs on the temple facade. The full moon is visible behind the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined stone street leading to open plaza

events.description: character descends the stairs and exits the temple area into the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the cobblestone street away from the temple, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the opposite direction along the street

entered.detail: leafy trees lining the stone paved street
tall columns with statues visible in the distant plaza

segments.scene_description: Having descended the temple stairs, the character walks along a cobblestone street lined with trees. The temple recedes into the background on the left as the character approaches an open plaza with tall honorific columns visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront plaza with honorific columns and distant lighthouse

events.description: character enters the open plaza with tall honorific columns and views of the waterfront
character approaches a market stall and second sphinx statue near the waterfront

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza toward the waterfront, passing between tall columns and approaching a vendor

notable_agents.action: vendor or worshipper standing beside the sphinx statue, facing the stone figure

entered.detail: tall lighthouse with fire at the top visible in the distance across the water
wooden vendor stall with fabric canopy and goods displayed
second reclining sphinx statue with detailed headdress near the vendor stall

segments.scene_description: The character explores a wide waterfront plaza lined with tall honorific columns topped with statues. A lighthouse burns in the distance across the water. The character approaches a market stall with a canopy where a second sphinx statue stands, with an NPC standing nearby.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the interior of a temple complex out toward a moonlit waterfront plaza. It begins with a run through an open courtyard past palm trees and a burning brazier beside a sphinx statue, momentarily obscured by a passing NPC. As the character ascends the grand temple staircase between flickering fires, the camera tilts upward to reveal towering columns and stone reliefs set against a bright full moon. The scene then shifts as the character descends and follows a tree-lined cobblestone street, leaving the temple behind while moving toward a distant array of honorific columns. Finally, the camera opens into a wide waterfront plaza where a distant lighthouse burns across the water and the path leads toward a canopied market stall guarded by another sphinx statue.
